title: StudioDash App Store Analytics
seoTitle: StudioDash App Store Analytics | BarkinMad Studios
description: StudioDash App Store Connect coverage for app status, downloads, sales reports, ratings, reviews, and trends.
summary: StudioDash uses App Store Connect coverage to help developers review app lifecycle status, downloads, revenue signals, ratings, reviews, and historical product performance.

sections.heading: App Store Connect coverage
paragraphs: StudioDash documents App Store Connect as a core provider for Apple-platform developers. The integration is intended to support app metadata, lifecycle status, downloads, revenue, ratings, reviews, and analytics where the connected account and API access allow it.

The public status is deliberately precise: App Store Connect metadata coverage is documented, while deeper reports and analytics should be described according to the access and product state available.

sections.heading: App portfolio view
paragraphs: For developers managing several products, StudioDash is designed to present app status in a portfolio-style view. This helps separate app lifecycle status from advertising status and website metrics.

App cards can show practical product information such as app name, Apple ID, lifecycle state, version/build, release signals, downloads, revenue, ratings, reviews, and App Store link state when those values are available.

sections.heading: Status language
paragraphs: StudioDash should use clear provider status wording. Public pages should not describe unconfigured, unavailable, or planned provider data as live.

The website uses In Development for the StudioDash product status. Provider-specific data should be described as available, in development, placeholder, or planned according to the documented provider coverage.
